case_title: MIER VIRTUDES VS MIER ALBERTO DBA LA CANASTA RESTAURANT et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MIER LILIA SIERRA DBA LA CANASTA RESTAURANT

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,050.00 FILED BY MIER VIRTUDES AS TO DEFENDANT MIER ALBERTO DBA LA CANASTA RESTAURANT MIER LILIA SIERRA DBA LA CANASTA RESTAURANT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-09-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MIER ALBERTO DBA LA CANASTA RESTAURANT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIER VIRTUDES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MIER ALBERTO DBA LA CANASTA RESTAURANT MIER LILIA SIERRA DBA LA CANASTA RESTAURANT $4,177.16 PRINCIPAL, $35.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,212.16, IN ADDITION, DEFENDANT TO PAY AMERICAN SAVINGS BANK THE SUM OF 18% INTEEST PER MONTH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
POS ON SUBPOENA TO DIANE NELSON (B OF A) FILED.
